grounding_checkpoint_required: Navigate to https://lepios-one.vercel.app/scan/history — page loads without error (no 404, no JS crash).
If scan_results has rows: table shows scans with correct date, ISBN, title, profit colour coding, and decision badges.
If scan_results is empty: 'No scans yet — go scan some books!' message appears with link to /scan.
Click 'BUY' filter — table reloads showing only rows where decision='buy'.
Spot-check one row: profit and ROI values should match what /scan showed when that book was scanned.
unknowns: Acceptance doc SQL used column name 'listed_at' but actual scan_results column is 'recorded_at' (confirmed from migration 0004_add_scan_results.sql). Route uses 'recorded_at'. Coordinator should update the acceptance doc to fix the column name reference.
Pre-existing TypeScript errors in tests/orb/, tests/sandbox/, tests/security/, tests/scripts/ were not touched — they are out of scope for this chunk.
F20: inline token-reference style={} permitted per ScannerClient.tsx precedent (matching existing pattern).
